basic_details.job_title: MSC Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 Junior Officer, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank (MSC Bank) is recruiting 26 Information Technology Specialized Officers across 16 distinct posts - from Manager (C-SOC Manager) down to Junior Officer roles - under Advertisement No. 04/MSC Bank/2026-27. Only Maharashtra-domiciled candidates can apply, and the completed Annexure-1 and Annexure-2 forms must reach the Bank's Mumbai office by Post, Speed Post, or Courier on or before 8 July 2026, up to 5:15 PM. There is no online application option for this recruitment.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated to eligible candidates directly

application_fee.details: Selection for these IT Specialized Officer posts is interview-based, with no written examination stage. After the interview, shortlisted candidates go through a multi-step verification process before receiving a final appointment. | Eligibility Screening – Applications are scrutinized against the post-specific eligibility criteria; only eligible candidates are shortlisted. Interview – Shortlisted candidates appear for a direct interview for the specific post they applied for. Preliminary Offer Letter – Issued to candidates who qualify in the interview. Verification Stage – Candidates undergo Background Verification, Police Verification, Medical Examination, and Documentation. Final Offer Letter – Issued once all verification steps are successfully completed. Probation Period – Selected candidates serve a 6-month probation, after which they are confirmed in their respective post. | The notification does not specify exact timelines between these stages; the interview date will be communicated directly to eligible candidates after screening.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: 10 years in IT/Cyber Security, including at least 5 years in SOC operations/incident response leadership
5 years in IT/Cyber Security with basic security monitoring and incident handling
3 years in IT operations (Hardware/Software/Database/Networking/Banking apps), including 2 years in IS audit, system audit & VAPT compliance
4 years with Digital Banking Platforms/Channels, plus NPCI product certification and testing experience
3 years in Oracle production database support (RedHat Linux/AIX/Windows)
3 years in digital platform/application support or NPCI product testing
3 years in compliance audit or risk management, with exposure to regulatory requirements and audit process
3 years in application support or banking IT systems
3 years working with a CSOC Center, including 1 year in cyber security/IT support
2 years in IT infrastructure or system support
3 years in CBS and IT support
2 years in CBS, allied applications and IT support
3 years in Oracle Production Database Support (RedHat Linux/AIX/Windows)

qualification.details: Current MSC Bank staff interested in these posts face a different set of conditions than external applicants, which is worth knowing before applying internally. | Applicants must first obtain written permission from the Bank, including prior approval of the Managing Director routed through their Department Incharge and the HRDM Manager. Confirmed employees who meet all eligibility criteria can apply but are not entitled to any concession. Official leave must be taken to attend the interview. If selected in the immediate senior grade, salary is fixed as per prevailing practice based on regular service, excluding any Special Workload Allowance from the previous grade. Employees applying for a post above their immediate seniority must resign from their current role after selection, following standard resignation rules. Instead of the 5-year bond, internally selected employees execute an undertaking on ₹500 stamp paper to serve the Bank until retirement or superannuation.

salary_details.details: Pay for these posts is structured by grade rather than by individual post, with Managers earning the highest consolidated pay and Junior Officers the entry-level pay. The Bank has not published a formal pay matrix or pay-level structure for this recruitment. | The final salary offered to a selected candidate will be commensurate with their qualification, experience, and interview performance, rather than fixed strictly by post.

how_to_apply: This recruitment does not have an "Apply Online" option - every application must be physically posted to the Bank. Following the steps below in order helps avoid the most common submission errors.
Visit the Bank's career page at https://msc.bank.in/career.
Download Annexure-1 (Application Form) and Annexure-2 (Declaration Form).
Fill in all details completely and affix a recent passport-size photograph.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant qualification and experience certificates.
Superscribe the envelope as "Application for the post of [post name]."

Send the sealed application via Post / Speed Post / Courier to: The Deputy General Manager (O.S.D.), HRD&M Department, The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Smruti Bhavan, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001, Post Box No. 472.
Ensure the application physically reaches the Bank on or before 08.07.2026, up to 5:15 PM - postmark dates are not mentioned as sufficient.
Candidates can apply for only one post, so the post name should be decided before filling the form.

content_sections.heading: Quick Summary: MSC Bank IT Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This section gives a one-glance view of the recruitment before diving into post-wise details. It covers the organization, total openings, application mode, and key deadline so candidates can quickly confirm whether they want to proceed.

rows.details: Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. (MSC Bank), Mumbai
Information Technology Specialized Officers (16 post categories)
Offline only - Post / Speed Post / Courier

content_sections.heading: About Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank
content_sections.text: MSC Bank is useful context for candidates evaluating this opportunity against other banking jobs. Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. is a scheduled bank and the leading apex cooperative bank in Maharashtra State, established in 1911. It operates through its Head Office in Mumbai, 6 Regional Offices, and 57 Branches across Maharashtra. This recruitment notification was signed by Managing Director Dilip N. Dighe and released on 18.06.2026. Download MSC Bank IT Officer Recruitment 2026 PDF

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for MSC Bank IT Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates need to track only a handful of dates for this recruitment since there is no exam stage. The eligibility cutoff and the application deadline are the two dates that matter most right now, while the interview date will be announced later directly to shortlisted applicants.

rows.event: Cutoff Date for Age, Qualification & Experience

rows.date: To be communicated to eligible candidates directly

content_sections.heading: Post-Wise Vacancy Details: 26 Openings Across 16 Posts
content_sections.text: The 26 vacancies are spread unevenly across four officer grades, with Junior Officer posts accounting for the largest share of openings. Each post also carries its own minimum age requirement, which candidates should check carefully since it varies by grade. The notification does not specify any maximum age limit or age relaxation provisions for any post or category - only the minimum age shown above applies, with 01.06.2026 as the reckoning date. Eligibility for these posts is built around a relevant technical degree, post-specific work experience, and - for most roles - a mandatory professional certification. Several posts also give preference to candidates who already have banking-sector experience, including the Network Administrator, Compliance, Allied Applications, and CSOC Shift Manager roles.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Most posts require a B.E./B.Tech. or Bachelor's degree in Electronics, E&TC, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, MCA, MCS, or M.Sc. Computer Science/IT from a recognized university or institution. Six posts - Officer Grade II (System Admin, Digital Platforms, Compliance, Allied Applications) and Junior Officer (Networking, IT Infrastructure, CBS Support, Allied Applications) - also accept candidates from Any Graduation stream. Assistant Manager (IT Compliance) additionally accepts any PG/Diploma in IT Management or MCA holders with any underlying degree, and Assistant Manager (CSOC) also considers a Diploma in IT with relevant years of experience. *If a shortlisted candidate does not already hold the listed certification, it must be obtained within one year of joining.

rows.minimum_experience: 10 years in IT/Cyber Security, including at least 5 years in SOC operations/incident response leadership
5 years in IT/Cyber Security with basic security monitoring and incident handling
3 years in IT operations (Hardware/Software/Database/Networking/Banking apps), including 2 years in IS audit, system audit & VAPT compliance
rows.mandatory_certification: IS Audit/VAPT certification; preference to CISA, DISA, Kali Linux, Metasploit, Burp Suite*

rows.minimum_experience: 4 years with Digital Banking Platforms/Channels, plus NPCI product certification and testing experience

rows.mandatory_certification: CCIE, JNCIP, NSE6, NSE7, CCNA or equivalent*

rows.minimum_experience: 3 years in Oracle production database support (RedHat Linux/AIX/Windows)
3 years in digital platform/application support or NPCI product testing
3 years in compliance audit or risk management, with exposure to regulatory requirements and audit process
rows.mandatory_certification: IS Audit/VAPT certification; preference to CISA, DISA, Kali Linux, Metasploit, Burp Suite*

rows.minimum_experience: 3 years in application support or banking IT systems
3 years working with a CSOC Center, including 1 year in cyber security/IT support

rows.mandatory_certification: CCIE, JNCIP, NSE6, NSE7, CCNA or equivalent*

rows.minimum_experience: 2 years in IT infrastructure or system support
rows.mandatory_certification: FTCP (any computer hardware certificate) / Azure Administrator AZ-104*

rows.minimum_experience: 3 years in CBS and IT support
2 years in CBS, allied applications and IT support
3 years in Oracle Production Database Support (RedHat Linux/AIX/Windows)

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Scale for MSC Bank IT Officer Posts
content_sections.text: Pay for these posts is structured by grade rather than by individual post, with Managers earning the highest consolidated pay and Junior Officers the entry-level pay. The Bank has not published a formal pay matrix or pay-level structure for this recruitment. The final salary offered to a selected candidate will be commensurate with their qualification, experience, and interview performance, rather than fixed strictly by post.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Selection for these IT Specialized Officer posts is interview-based, with no written examination stage. After the interview, shortlisted candidates go through a multi-step verification process before receiving a final appointment. Eligibility Screening – Applications are scrutinized against the post-specific eligibility criteria; only eligible candidates are shortlisted. Interview – Shortlisted candidates appear for a direct interview for the specific post they applied for. Preliminary Offer Letter – Issued to candidates who qualify in the interview. Verification Stage – Candidates undergo Background Verification, Police Verification, Medical Examination, and Documentation. Final Offer Letter – Issued once all verification steps are successfully completed. Probation Period – Selected candidates serve a 6-month probation , after which they are confirmed in their respective post. The notification does not specify exact timelines between these stages; the interview date will be communicated directly to eligible candidates after screening.

content_sections.heading: Documents and Service Bond Requirements
content_sections.text: Beyond the application form itself, candidates need to prepare supporting documents and understand the service commitment attached to this recruitment. This is an area where incomplete submissions commonly lead to rejection. Self-attested photocopies of all relevant qualification and experience certificates must be enclosed with the application. A domicile certificate of Maharashtra State is compulsory , since only Maharashtra residents are eligible to apply. A recent passport-size photograph must be affixed (not pinned or stapled) to Annexure-1. Selected candidates must execute an undertaking on ₹500 stamp paper committing to serve the Bank for a minimum of 5 years from the date of joining. Breach of this undertaking requires payment of ₹10 lakh as liquidated damages upon demand, along with two surety bonds of ₹1 lakh each from two income-tax-paying sureties. Candidates currently employed in government departments, PSUs, banks, or financial institutions must inform their employer in writing before applying and attach proof of this with the application. At the time of joining, selected candidates must produce a proper discharge certificate from their previous employer.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply: Offline Application Process
content_sections.text: This recruitment does not have an "Apply Online" option - every application must be physically posted to the Bank. Following the steps below in order helps avoid the most common submission errors. Visit the Bank's career page at https://msc.bank.in/career . Download Annexure-1 (Application Form) and Annexure-2 (Declaration Form) . Fill in all details completely and affix a recent passport-size photograph. Attach self-attested photocopies of all relevant qualification and experience certificates. Superscribe the envelope as "Application for the post of [post name]." Send the sealed application via Post / Speed Post / Courier to: The Deputy General Manager (O.S.D.), HRD&M Department, The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Smruti Bhavan, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001, Post Box No. 472. Ensure the application physically reaches the Bank on or before 08.07.2026, up to 5:15 PM - postmark dates are not mentioned as sufficient. Candidates can apply for only one post , so the post name should be decided before filling the form.

content_sections.heading: Special Eligibility Rules for Existing MSC Bank Employees
content_sections.text: Current MSC Bank staff interested in these posts face a different set of conditions than external applicants, which is worth knowing before applying internally. Applicants must first obtain written permission from the Bank , including prior approval of the Managing Director routed through their Department Incharge and the HRDM Manager. Confirmed employees who meet all eligibility criteria can apply but are not entitled to any concession . Official leave must be taken to attend the interview. If selected in the immediate senior grade, salary is fixed as per prevailing practice based on regular service, excluding any Special Workload Allowance from the previous grade. Employees applying for a post above their immediate seniority must resign from their current role after selection, following standard resignation rules. Instead of the 5-year bond, internally selected employees execute an undertaking on ₹500 stamp paper to serve the Bank until retirement or superannuation .

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid When Applying
content_sections.text: These are practical pitfalls based on how this recruitment is structured, meant to help candidates submit a clean application the first time.

rows.detail: The Deputy General Manager (O.S.D.), HRD&M Department, MSC Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Smruti Bhavan, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSC Bank IT Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The completed application must physically reach the Bank on or before 08 July 2026, up to 5:15 PM, sent by Post, Speed Post, or Courier.

faq.question: Q2. Is the MSC Bank IT Officer application process online or offline?
faq.answer: It is entirely offline. Candidates download Annexure-1 and Annexure-2 from https://msc.bank.in/career and post the completed forms; there is no apply-online portal for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are 26 vacancies spread across 16 different IT Specialized Officer posts, ranging from Manager (C-SOC Manager) down to Junior Officer roles.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for MSC Bank IT Specialized Officer posts?
faq.answer: Only candidates domiciled in Maharashtra State can apply, with a domicile certificate compulsory, in addition to meeting the post-specific qualification, age, and experience requirements.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MSC Bank IT Officer posts?
faq.answer: Selection is through eligibility screening followed by a direct interview - there is no written exam. Candidates who clear the interview then undergo background verification, police verification, medical examination, and documentation before receiving a final offer.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for these posts?
faq.answer: Approximate monthly pay is ₹83,000 for Manager, ₹67,000 for Assistant Manager, ₹60,000 for Officer Grade II, and ₹54,000 for Junior Officer, with the final figure depending on qualification, experience, and interview performance.

faq.question: Q8. Can existing MSC Bank employees apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, but only after obtaining written permission from the Bank and prior approval of the Managing Director through their Department Incharge and the HRDM Manager.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an age relaxation for any category?
faq.answer: The notification specifies only a minimum age per post (24 to 32 years depending on the role) as on 01 June 2026; no maximum age limit or age relaxation is mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q10. Where should the completed application be sent?
faq.answer: Applications go to The Deputy General Manager (O.S.D.), HRD&M Department, The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd., Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Smruti Bhavan, 9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort, Mumbai – 400001, Post Box No. 472.
